ABOUT_ME.DESCRIPTION_1: Hello, I'm Leonardo Hernández, I studied five years of computer engineering at UNEG University, I have about three years of work experience in web and mobile application development. I consider myself a frontend development specialist, with some knowledge of backend technologies. I was a designer from a young age making flyers for parties and covers for music artists. Then I started building wireframes and screen prototypes for web and mobile applications.
ABOUT_ME.DESCRIPTION_2: I consider it quite timely and interesting to start working in the field in which I have been training in recent years upon completing my university degree, and thus be able to apply everything I have learned to date.
ABOUT_ME.HIGH_SCHOOL: Nuestra Señora de Lourdes - High School
ABOUT_ME.HIGH_SCHOOL_DESC: The 'Nuestra Señora de Lourdes' Educational Unit is constituted by different facilities, built in order to provide adequate teaching and preparation both educational, moral and civic; so that Lourdes students receive learning about different areas and can employ their acquired knowledge.
ABOUT_ME.UNIVERSITY: Universidad Nacional Experimental de Guayana - University
ABOUT_ME.UNIVERSITY_DESC: Venezuelan University, born on March 18, 1938, educator, forger of organization and development in Higher Education; founded on March 9, 1982 by presidential decree No. 1,432 of President Luis Herrera Campins.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Experience
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_DESC: Participation in currency exchange project based on Angular. Use of Rest API, Validations and advanced forms. Freelance modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_2_DESC: Participation in FHIA project based on Quasar + Vue. Use of Rest API, layout and use of indexed DB. Freelance modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_3_DESC: Participation in Ecommerce project based on Angular, applying the use of Material Angular for its visual. Rest API consumption and administrative module development. Remote modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_4_DESC: Internship, development of two web systems based on Laravel and Angular 6. Inventory system of the editorial production department and image bank of the graphic design department. In-person modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_5_DESC: Writing lessons regarding music production using FL Studio software. Remote modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_6_DESC: Internship, development of two web systems based on Laravel and Angular 6. Inventory system of the editorial production department and image bank of the graphic design department. In-person modality.
